creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: antoine
Date: Tue Jan 14 20:23:34 2014
New Revision: 339712
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/339712
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r339712/

Log:
  - Fix build with clang
  - Stage support
  
  PR:		ports/185692
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru

Added:
  head/misc/kcd/files/patch-gentree.cc   (contents, props changed)
  head/misc/kcd/files/patch-scandir.cc   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/misc/kcd/Makefile
  head/misc/kcd/files/patch-dirtree.cc
  head/misc/kcd/pkg-plist

Modified: head/misc/kcd/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/kcd/Makefile	Tue Jan 14 19:52:42 2014	(r339711)
+++ head/misc/kcd/Makefile	Tue Jan 14 20:23:34 2014	(r339712)
@@ -12,33 +12,29 @@ COMMENT=	Change directory in full-screen
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
-USES=		gettext perl5
+USES=		gettext ncurses perl5
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--sysconfdir=${PREFIX}/etc
+
 CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib -lintl
 
-MAN1=		kcd.1
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS EXAMPLES
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/kcd-inst ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/kcdscr ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/kcdmain ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/kcd.1 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/kcd-inst ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/kcdscr ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/kcdmain ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/kcd.1 ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
 .for i in en_GB en_GB.UTF-8 en_US.UTF-8
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/locale/${i}/LC_MESSAGES
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/share/locale/${i}/LC_MESSAGES
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/po/${i}.gmo \
-		${PREFIX}/share/locale/${i}/LC_MESSAGES/kcd.mo
+		${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/share/locale/${i}/LC_MESSAGES/kcd.mo
 .endfor
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${DOCSDIR}
-	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/kcd.csh.init ${EXAMPLESDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/kcd.sh.init ${EXAMPLESDIR}
-.endif
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/kcd.csh.init ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/kcd.sh.init ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/misc/kcd/files/patch-dirtree.cc
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/kcd/files/patch-dirtree.cc	Tue Jan 14 19:52:42 2014	(r339711)
+++ head/misc/kcd/files/patch-dirtree.cc	Tue Jan 14 20:23:34 2014	(r339712)
@@ -1,6 +1,17 @@
 --- dirtree.cc.orig	2009-02-18 13:01:05.000000000 +0100
 +++ dirtree.cc	2013-05-27 18:11:32.183060000 +0200
-@@ -170,12 +170,12 @@
+@@ -25,6 +25,10 @@
+ #include "cstrlib.h"
+ #include "gentree.h"
+ 
++#ifdef HAVE_UNISTD_H
++# include <unistd.h>
++#endif
++
+ sptr_list<DirectoryEntry> dirTree;
+ 
+ const char	uniqueTag[] = "<KCDID#9>";	// File ID
+@@ -170,12 +174,12 @@
  			ReadSaveFile(dirTree, filegz);
  		}
  		catch(ErrorBadFileFormat &) {

Added: head/misc/kcd/files/patch-gentree.cc
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/misc/kcd/files/patch-gentree.cc	Tue Jan 14 20:23:34 2014	(r339712)
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+--- gentree.cc.orig
++++ gentree.cc
+@@ -29,6 +29,10 @@
+ #include "cstrlib.h"
+ #include "scandir.h"
+ 
++#ifdef HAVE_UNISTD_H
++# include <unistd.h>
++#endif
++
+ //#define DUMP_HTML	
+ #ifdef DUMP_HTML
+ # include <fcntl.h>

Added: head/misc/kcd/files/patch-scandir.cc
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/misc/kcd/files/patch-scandir.cc	Tue Jan 14 20:23:34 2014	(r339712)
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+--- scandir.cc.orig
++++ scandir.cc
+@@ -32,6 +32,10 @@
+ #include "cstrlib.h"
+ #include "dirtree.h"
+ 
++#ifdef HAVE_UNISTD_H
++# include <unistd.h>
++#endif
++
+ /*************************************************************************
+ 	Log scan results to command line output
+ *************************************************************************/

Modified: head/misc/kcd/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/kcd/pkg-plist	Tue Jan 14 19:52:42 2014	(r339711)
+++ head/misc/kcd/pkg-plist	Tue Jan 14 20:23:34 2014	(r339712)
@@ -1,15 +1,16 @@
 bin/kcd-inst
 bin/kcdmain
 bin/kcdscr
+man/man1/kcd.1.gz
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README
+%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/kcd.csh.init
+%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/kcd.sh.init
 share/locale/en_GB/LC_MESSAGES/kcd.mo
 share/locale/en_GB.UTF-8/LC_MESSAGES/kcd.mo
 share/locale/en_US.UTF-8/LC_MESSAGES/kcd.mo
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/kcd.csh.init
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/kcd.sh.init
-%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%EXAMPLESDIR%%
-%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
-@dirrmtry share/locale/en_GB.UTF-8/LC_MESSAGES
-@dirrmtry share/locale/en_GB.UTF-8
 @dirrmtry share/locale/en_US.UTF-8/LC_MESSAGES
 @dirrmtry share/locale/en_US.UTF-8
+@dirrmtry share/locale/en_GB.UTF-8/LC_MESSAGES
+@dirrmtry share/locale/en_GB.UTF-8
+%%PORTEXAMPLES%%@dirrm %%EXAMPLESDIR%%
+%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
